data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to subscriber-to-endpoint ownership, indicating a clear gap in the implementation. Specifically, the evidence pointers do not reference any mechanisms or endpoints that would validate this ownership, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: Lack of evidence for subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
